initial_draft:
Okay, I'm Player BLUE. Let's analyze this situation. Red has 100 dollars, and I have 0. Red is proposing to give me 15 dollars. If I accept, I'll have 15 dollars, and Red will have 85 dollars. If I reject, we both lose everything. Since I start with nothing, gaining 15 dollars is a good outcome. I'll accept.

```
<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1/4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> Red is offering me 15 dollars. I start with nothing, so this is a very favorable trade. Rejecting means we both lose. Therefore, I accept. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> I accept your offer! </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```
